name: Pasta with Eggplant & Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Spaghetti, fusilli or other hearty pasta shape
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the diced eggplant on a cookie sheet and sprinkle with salt. Let drain for 30 minutes.
2. Rinse the eggplant well.
3. Sauté the drained eggplant in olive oil until lightly browned. Set aside.
4. In a separate pan, sauté the onion and garlic in about 1 tablespoon of olive oil until softened.
5. Add the tomato sauce and wine to the pan. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15 to 20 minutes.
6. Season with sugar if needed, salt, pepper, and oregano.
7. Return the eggplant to the pot and continue to simmer while the pasta cooks.
8. Cook the pasta until al dente and drain.
9. Toss the pasta with the sauce to mix well and serve immediately.
